@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
autonumber "<b>[0]"

box "Upstream" #LightBlue2
    participant ":Producer\nC" as Producer1
    participant ":Adapter\nE" as Adapter1
end box

participant ":Transport\nS" as Transport1

box "" #WhiteSmoke
    participant ":Adapter\nE" as Adapter3
    participant ":Consumer\nG" as Consumer4
    
    rect "#D5F6FF" 
        note over GatewayJobHandler : JobExecution
        
        participant ":GatewayJobHandler\nG" as GatewayJobHandler
    endrect
end box


box "" #WhiteSmoke    
    participant ":Gateway\nG" as Gateway7
    participant ":Producer\nE" as Producer8
    participant ":Adapter\nE" as Adapter9
end box 

participant ":Transport\nS" as Transport10 


box "Downstream" #LightBlue2
  participant ":Adapter\nE" as Adapter11  
  participant ":Consumer\nG" as Consumer12
  
   rect "#D5F6FF"   
      note over DownStreamJobHandler : JobExecution
      
       participant ":DownStreamJobHandler\nG" as DownStreamJobHandler       
   endrect
   
end box  

participant ":Lower Layer\nS" as LowerLayer



== ==

activate Producer1
Producer1 ->> Adapter1: publish(command)
deactivate Producer1

activate Adapter1
Adapter1->> Transport1:publish(command)\nresolve()
deactivate Adapter1

activate Transport1
Transport1->> Adapter3: execute(command) \nhandler(command, done)
deactivate Transport1

activate Adapter3
adapter3 --> adapter3: subscribe("done")\nemit("command",\ngatewayjobhandler)
Adapter3--> gatewayjobhandler: emit("response"\,response)
gatewayjobhandler -x transport1:getDelay(command)
transport1-x producer1: getdelay(command)
producer1-]producer1: resolve()\subscribe(handler)
producer1--]adapter1:subcribe(response')
adapter1 --]consumer4: handler('respones'\ndone())
consumer4 ]]> consumer4: subscibe(done)\nemit command,\ngatewaay job hander
consumer4]]downstreamjobhandeler:emmit response , resposne
downstreamjobhandler ]] lowerlayer: done ()
lower layer >> downstreamjobhander: emitt 'donw'
dowmstremjohandker>>consumr12:hander(comman,dond )
consume r12 > adpater11:dones(respons e)
adaptr11>]transpotrt10:gtdelay(ommand)dnoeresponse
tranportt10<]<[adaptre9:susbsciber(esoponse)
adaoter9 <][produceR8:pulish(coammdo))
producre8<>gatway7:publissh(cmmnad)
gatawy7 <> gtaewayjoobhanlder: don(e)
gateawyjbahnder<<consuer4:eit(doen)
conseru4 << adapte3;doen(repsosne)
aapter3><trasnpot1;dons(rspose)
tnasprot1 >< adatper1 ;emi(respns',respse)
adatpr1 ][ producr1: hader(rspeoe)
prodcue1 [)[ adaote1:onTmeout(getDealyi()))unsucrsber(i)




@enduml
